issues.issueMessage:
Field description: If HED tags are used:
The version of the HED schema used to validate HED tags for study.
May include a single schema or a base schema and one or more library schema.
Field description: Used to specify provenance of the dataset.

Field description: Used to specify the locations and relevant attributes of all source datasets (BIDS or not).
Valid keys in each object include `"URL"`, `"DOI"` (see
[URI](SPEC_ROOT/common-principles.md#uniform-resource-indicator)), and
`"Version"` with
[string](https://www.w3schools.com/js/js_json_datatypes.asp)
values.

Field description: The address of the institution in charge of the equipment that produced the
measurements.

Field description: The department in the institution in charge of the equipment that produced
the measurements.
Field description: ID of the tracer compound from the RadLex Ontology.

Field description: ID of the tracer compound from the SNOMED Ontology
(subclass of Radioactive isotope).
Field description: Accurate molecular weight of the tracer used.
Field description: Unit of the molecular weights measurement (for example, `"g/mol"`).
Field description: Injected mass per kilogram bodyweight.

Field description: Unit format of the injected mass per kilogram bodyweight
(for example, `"ug/kg"`).

Field description: Time to which specific radioactivity measurement above applies in the default
unit `"hh:mm:ss"`.

Field description: Molar activity of compound injected.
Corresponds to [DICOM Tag 0018, 1077](http://www.dicomlookup.com/dicomtags/(0018,1077))
`Radiopharmaceutical Specific Activity`.
Field description: Unit of the specified molar radioactivity (for example, `"GBq/umol"`).

Field description: Time to which molar radioactivity measurement above applies in the default
unit `"hh:mm:ss"`.

Field description: Amount of radioactivity infused into the patient.
This value must be less than or equal to the total injected radioactivity
(`"InjectedRadioactivity"`).
Units should be the same as `"InjectedRadioactivityUnits"`.

Field description: Time of start of infusion with respect to `"TimeZero"` in the default unit
seconds.
Field description: If given, infusion speed.
Field description: Unit of infusion speed (for example, `"mL/s"`).
Field description: Purity of the radiolabeled compound (between 0 and 100%).
Field description: Name of pharmaceutical.
Field description: Dose amount of administered pharmaceutical.

Field description: Unit format relating to pharmaceutical dose
(for example, `"mg"` or `"mg/kg"`).

Field description: Details of the pharmaceutical dose regimen.
Either adequate description or short-code relating to regimen documented
elsewhere (for example, `"single oral bolus"`).

Field description: Time of administration of pharmaceutical dose, relative to time zero.
For an infusion, this should be a vector with two elements specifying the
start and end of the infusion period. For more complex dose regimens,
the regimen description should be complete enough to enable unambiguous
interpretation of `"PharmaceuticalDoseTime"`.
Unit format of the specified pharmaceutical dose time MUST be seconds.

Field description: Time of end of injection with respect to `"TimeZero"` in the default unit
seconds.
Field description: Unit of reconstruction parameters (for example, `["none", "none"]`).
Field description: Values of reconstruction parameters (for example, `[21, 3]`).
Field description: Kernel size of post-recon filter (FWHM) in default units `"mm"`.
Field description: Identification for the software used, such as name and version.
Field description: Reference paper for the attenuation correction method used.

Field description: Scale factor for each frame. This field MUST be defined if the imaging data (`.nii[.gz]`) are scaled.
If this field is not defined, then it is assumed that the scaling factor is 1. Defining this field
when the scaling factor is 1 is RECOMMENDED, for the sake of clarity.
Field description: Scatter fraction for each frame (Units: 0-100%).
Field description: Prompt rate for each frame (same units as `Units`, for example, `"Bq/mL"`).
Field description: Singles rate for each frame (same units as `Units`, for example, `"Bq/mL"`).
Field description: Random rate for each frame (same units as `"Units"`, for example, `"Bq/mL"`).

codeMessages.JSON_KEY_RECOMMENDED: A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
codeMessages.SIDECAR_KEY_RECOMMENDED: A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
